description: Classic loafers with a tapering pointed toe from provogue for men with a refined, stacked heel. Slim, sleek silhouetting on this stylish shoe with appropriate stitch detailing gives this an elegant profile. Style this with tonal, double pleated trousers, a blazer and a crisp shirt. Upper Genuine leather upper with reinforced overlay on the heel and midfoot Sitch detailing on the overlay seams on the forefoot Slip on styling with elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for ease of wearability Soft sockliner for instep comfort Brand badge on the lateral side of the midfoot Midsole Shock absorbing EVA midsole Outsole TPR outsole with a stacked heel and a maple leaf pattern on the forefoot Textured grooves on the midfoot and heel for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
